display.purpose: Hero on customer brand pages, shop name on Shopkeeper's Window. One per page; never inside a card.

headline.purpose: Section heads on customer surfaces, card-as-hero titles, empty-state headlines.

title.purpose: Card titles, list-item primary, dialog titles, settings group heads.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, descriptions, long-form merchant text. Max 72ch.

label.purpose: Chips, pills, badges, button text, table headers. Sentence case in Italian; only saffron reward badges use ALL CAPS.

mono.purpose: Prices, distances, point balances, order codes, compact addresses.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Default. No shadow. A 1px Warm Edge border carries separation when needed.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Hover on buttons and primary surfaces; default on dropdown menus.

shadows.name: lg
shadows.purpose: Drawers, sheets, the merchant detail Shopkeeper's Window when it enters the viewport.

shadows.name: xl
shadows.purpose: Modal dialogs only. Used very rarely; modals are usually laziness.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default state easing: hover, focus, color transitions.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Stronger ease-out for layout entries: drawers, sheets, the Shopkeeper's Window opening.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: State transitions on color, opacity, border.

motion.name: duration-layout
motion.purpose: Layout transitions: drawers entering, sheets settling.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Ink on Cream, calm and confident.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.34 0.10 258); color: oklch(0.985 0.008 80); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 0.625rem 1.125rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.425rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.24 0.08 258); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.78 0.14 75); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Warm Paper surface, Ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.965 0.012 80); color: oklch(0.34 0.10 258); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 0.625rem 1.125rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.012 80); border-radius: 0.425rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.91 0.012 80); border-color: oklch(0.86 0.014 80); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.46 0.10 258); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action inside cards or quiet contexts.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.34 0.10 258); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.425rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.965 0.012 80); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.46 0.10 258); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: The customer search bar. Holds the cursor; opens, never gates.
components.html: <label class="ds-input-search"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M11 11l3 3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg><input type="search" placeholder="Cerca nel quartiere…" /></label>
components.css: .ds-input-search { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.985 0.008 80); color: oklch(0.50 0.012 80); padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.012 80); border-radius: 0.425rem; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input-search:focus-within { border-color: oklch(0.34 0.10 258); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.78 0.14 75 / 0.5); color: oklch(0.34 0.10 258); } .ds-input-search input { background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; color: oklch(0.22 0.014 80); width: 22ch; } .ds-input-search input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.50 0.012 80); }

components.name: Shop Card
components.description: Discovery tile in the Market Square. Photo + identity + presence + distance, no price.
components.html:
Salumeria Borgo

Salumi e formaggi locali

0,4 kmAperto fino alle 19:30
components.css: .ds-card-shop { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: oklch(0.965 0.012 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.012 80); border-radius: 0.625rem; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-card-shop:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.05); border-color: oklch(0.86 0.014 80); } .ds-card-shop__photo { aspect-ratio: 3 / 4; background: linear-gradient(160deg, oklch(0.91 0.012 80), oklch(0.86 0.014 80)); } .ds-card-shop__body { padding: 1rem 1rem 1.25rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-card-shop__name { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: oklch(0.22 0.014 80); margin: 0; } .ds-card-shop__line { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; color: oklch(0.50 0.012 80); margin: 0; } .ds-card-shop__meta { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 0.5rem; } .ds-pill-distance { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: oklch(0.985 0.008 80); color: oklch(0.34 0.10 258); font-family: Geist Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.012 80); } .ds-pill-presence { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; color: oklch(0.46 0.10 258); padding: 0.25rem 0; } .ds-pill-presence__dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.78 0.14 75); } .ds-pill-presence--open .ds-pill-presence__dot { background: oklch(0.78 0.14 75); }

components.name: Reward Pill
components.description: Signature: the Reward Thread. Saffron pill announces points earned. ALL CAPS. ≤1 per surface.
components.html: +5 PUNTI
components.css: .ds-badge-reward { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.78 0.14 75); color: oklch(0.22 0.014 80); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Civic Pill
components.description: Signature: 360° civic involvement. Marks surfaces where a Comune participates.
components.html: Il Comune di Modena partecipa
components.css: .ds-badge-civic { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; background: oklch(0.965 0.012 80); color: oklch(0.34 0.10 258); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.34 0.10 258); border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Bottom Tab Bar (Customer)
components.description: Mobile-first navigation for the customer app. Saffron underline marks active.
components.html: HomeCercaPremiProfilo
components.css: .ds-nav-bottom { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); background: oklch(0.985 0.008 80); border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.012 80); padding: 0.25rem 0 calc(0.25rem + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } .ds-nav-bottom__item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.25rem; min-height: 44px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; color: oklch(0.46 0.10 258); text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-bottom__item:hover { color: oklch(0.34 0.10 258); } .ds-nav-bottom__item--active { color: oklch(0.34 0.10 258); } .ds-nav-bottom__item--active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 25%; right: 25%; height: 2px; border-radius: 2px; background: oklch(0.78 0.14 75); }

narrative.overview: bibs is shaped like the gesture in its own logo. An open hand offering, palm up, neither pulling nor pushing. The interface is confident enough to slow down: it makes room around the merchant, the product, the place. Where Amazon collapses everything into a yellow-CTA grid, bibs leaves space for a shop's name, its street, the hours it keeps today. Two surface idioms run inside this metaphor without breaking it: The Shopkeeper's Window (every merchant detail page, photo-led, identity above inventory) and The Market Square (discovery and home, presence + distance + 'aperto adesso' + civic chips). The parent metaphor decides the tone; the surface idioms decide the rhythm.
keyCharacteristics: Navy ink on warm cream, never pure white, never black.
Generous spacing as a moral position. The merchant gets room.
Geist (UI workhorse) + Bricolage Grotesque (warm display). Two voices, one register.
Saffron is the only saturated accent. ≤5% of the surface, signal moments only.
Flat by default. Elevation is reserved for state response.
Motion respects prefers-reduced-motion without exception. Ease-out exponential, no bounce.

rules.name: The Single Hand Rule
rules.body: Saffron belongs to ≤5% of any given screen, only on signal moments: reward, civic, presence, focus. Every additional saffron pixel weakens the one that earned its place.

rules.name: The Ink Rule
rules.body: Pure black (#000) and pure white (#fff) are prohibited. Foreground is Dusk; background is Cream.

rules.name: The No-Cyan Rule
rules.body: The current shadcn preset's cyan-sky primary is legacy and contradicts the wordmark. Do not introduce new uses; migrate opportunistically. The brand voice is navy ink.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Bricolage carries identity. Geist carries information. Mixing roles breaks the system.

rules.name: The 72ch Rule
rules.body: Body copy never exceeds 72 characters per line.

rules.name: The Italian-First Rule
rules.body: All scale ratios are tuned on Italian copy, which runs slightly longer than English. Verify hierarchy with Italian strings; never tune on Lorem ipsum.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Shadows respond to state. Decorative ambient glow is forbidden.

rules.name: The 1px Border Rule
rules.body: Where shadow would be the obvious answer for separation at rest, use a 1px Warm Edge border instead.

dos: Do lead with the merchant: face, name, place, hours come before the inventory grid on every customer surface.
Do use Ink as the brand voice. Wordmark, primary buttons, headlines, focus rings: the same Ink everywhere.
Do keep Saffron at ≤5% of any screen, on signal moments only.
Do show distance, opening status, and pickup-or-delivery affordances on every store and product card.
Do show the civic pill ('il Comune di X partecipa') wherever it's true.
Do keep Body lines under 72 characters.
Do tune typography on Italian copy.
Do keep the system flat by default.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion without an opt-out.
Do ease out with exponential curves (cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) or steeper). 150-220ms for state, 280-380ms for layout.
donts: Don't introduce new uses of the cyan-sky --primary. The brand is navy Ink. The cyan is legacy.
Don't use pure #000 or #fff anywhere. Foreground is Dusk; background is Cream.
Don't use a side-stripe border (border-left > 1px) as a colored accent.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text over a gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop-blur as decoration.
Don't ship the SaaS hero-metric template.
Don't ship identical icon-heading-text card grids.
Don't ship Amazon-style yellow CTAs, infinite anonymous product grids, or density-over-clarity layouts.
Don't ship Groupon-style coupon stickers, countdown timers, or manipulative urgency.
Don't put crypto / web3 / dark-and-neon energy anywhere.
Don't put Bricolage on a price or a button. Bricolage is the *who*; Geist is the *what*.
Don't nest a card inside a card.
Don't wrap everything in a container with the same padding.
Don't reach for a modal as the first thought.
